decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id 'corridor_14th-street-ttp' is the closest registry match — it is the exact same registry card. The source '14th_street_truck_transit_priority_trifold_r1_p2' is already in the registry record's source_ids, and the alias 'corridor_14th-street-ttp-trifold' is in its record_aliases. The limits in the observation (9th Avenue to 3rd Avenue) are consistent with the registry record's eastbound limits. Since the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, this is 'new' (it already resolves to that id), per the rule that link must match a DIFFERENT existing record.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Left turns will not be allowed off of 14th Street between 9th Avenue and 3rd Avenue.
